41400 = Accidental exposure to smoke, fire, and 
flames (X00–X09) 

41500 = Accidental contact with heat and hot 
substances (X10–X19) 

41600 = Lightning (X33) 

41700 = Earthquake, volcanic eruption, 
avalanche, landslide, and other 
earth movements (X34–X36) 

41800 = Cataclysmic storm and flood 
(X37–X38) 

41900 = Accidental poisoning and 
exposure to noxious substances 
(X40–X49) 

42000 = Accidental poisoning by and 
exposure to drugs and other 
biological substances (X40–X44)
